title: Show HN: I spend hours every week manually reconciling Stripe payouts
text: Solo founders waste hours each month manually matching Stripe payouts to invoices in spreadsheets. It is tedious and error-prone.
pain: Solo SaaS founders waste hours manually reconciling Stripe payouts against invoices

title: Trending: open-source framework for local-first LLM agents
text: A local-first agent framework is trending; developers want privacy-preserving agents that run without sending data to the cloud.
pain: Developers lack a privacy-preserving way to run LLM agents locally without cloud data leakage

title: Yet another AI note-taking chatbot launched today
text: Another generic AI note app launched. The space is crowded and undifferentiated.
pain: Knowledge workers are overwhelmed by too many generic note apps that do not fit their workflow

title: Ask HN: customer support teams drowning in repetitive tickets
text: Support teams handle the same repetitive questions manually; it is slow and frustrating and burns agent time.
pain: Customer support teams waste time manually answering repetitive tickets

title: New paper: retrieval-augmented agents for vertical domains
text: Research shows RAG agents tuned to a narrow vertical with proprietary datasets outperform generic assistants.
pain: Domain experts lack vertical AI assistants grounded in their proprietary domain data

title: Indie devs struggle to keep changelogs and docs in sync
text: Indie developers find it hard and tedious to keep release notes, changelogs and docs updated; it is repetitive manual work.
pain: Indie developers waste time manually keeping changelogs and docs in sync with releases

title: Angel investors lack a fast way to triage inbound deal flow
text: Solo angels get overwhelmed by inbound pitches and lack a fast, structured way to triage deal flow.
pain: Solo investors are overwhelmed and lack a fast way to triage inbound deal flow

title: Voice-first AI tool for hands-free coding gains traction
text: A voice-first multimodal coding assistant is gaining traction with developers who want hands-free workflows.
pain: Developers with RSI lack a reliable voice-first way to code hands-free
